description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 35 hrs 51 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 6 mins. His WakaTime activity was mostly in Other, Java, and Markdown, across 6 projects. GitHub activity in the provided data shows no commits, pull requests, or new repositories.
